name: Data#3 Limited
analysis: DTL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$9.7000. Trade idea: entry A$9.8800, stop A$8.7615, target A$13.2355 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
